detail: A3.T6 must_preserve requires 'graph of exactly two lines shown', but the clone has no stimulus/graph and presents only the algebraic equations y=x+1, y=-x+5. This is the categorical drift to A1 explicitly warned about in common_bugs.
A3.T6 must_preserve requires 'graph of exactly two lines shown', but the clone provides only equations y=2x-1, y=-x+8 with no graph (stimulus is null). Categorical drift from A3 to A1.

T2 description requires that 'both equations involve both variables', but the clone's second equation y=17 is a single-variable equation that already isolates y. This is T1 (trivial one-equation isolates a variable) structure, not T2.
T2 requires both equations involve both variables; here y=22 already isolates y, making this a T1 (trivial one-equation isolates a variable) structure rather than T2.
A3.T6 must_preserve requires 'graph of exactly two lines shown'; clone has no graph (stimulus null) and presents only equations y=-2x+3, y=x-6. Categorical drift to A1.
A3.T6 must_preserve requires 'graph of exactly two lines shown'; clone has no graph and only lists equations y=x, y=-x+6. Categorical drift to A1.
